import React from'react';import{useGSAP}from'../hooks';import{scrollToSection,COMPANY_INFO}from'../utils';import{Button}from'./ui';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CTA=()=>{const scope=useGSAP((gsap,el)=>{const tl=gsap.timeline({scrollTrigger:{trigger:el,start:'top 80%',toggleActions:'play none none none'}});tl.from('.cta-title',{y:50,opacity:0,duration:1,ease:'expo.out'}).from('.cta-text',{y:30,opacity:0,stagger:0.1,duration:0.7},'-=0.5').from('.cta-btn',{y:20,opacity:0,stagger:0.1,duration:0.6},'-=0.3');// Parallax on decorative circle
gsap.to('.cta-deco-circle',{rotation:180,y:-50,ease:'none',scrollTrigger:{trigger:el,start:'top bottom',end:'bottom top',scrub:1}});});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{ref:scope,className:"bg-gold py-20 md:py-32 relative overflow-hidden",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"cta-deco-circle absolute w-[300px] h-[300px] border border-primary/10 rounded-full -top-[100px] right-[10%] pointer-events-none"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"text-center max-w-[700px] mx-auto relative z-10",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{className:"cta-title text-display-lg font-medium text-primary mb-6",children:["Protect What ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"font-serif italic",children:"Matters"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"cta-text text-xl text-primary/60 mb-4",children:["For just $",COMPANY_INFO.price," for the first year, ensure your will is safe, accessible, and ready to honor your wishes."]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"cta-text text-base text-primary/40 mb-10",children:["Opening promo \u2014 $",COMPANY_INFO.priceAfterPromo,"/year after your first year"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex flex-wrap gap-4 justify-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Button,{href:"#pricing",variant:"dark",icon:true,className:"cta-btn",onClick:e=>scrollToSection(e,'pricing'),children:["Get Started for $",COMPANY_INFO.price,"/yr"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{href:"#contact",variant:"outline-dark",className:"cta-btn",onClick:e=>scrollToSection(e,'contact'),children:"Contact Us"})]})]})})]});};export default CTA;
